narrative: Geopolitical tensions escalate as IRGC warns to stop all imports and exports in the Gulf of Oman if US continues blockade — USD mixed; EUR/USD at 1.178, GBP/USD near 1.3545. USD/JPY firms to 158.96 on yield differential, while AUD/USD holds at 0.7137. Gold lower -0.45% on reduced safe-haven demand amid equity gains +1.18% and VIX at 18.2.
